name: HRG_GOAL_MASS_REQUESTS
description: Stores the details of "Goal plan generation" or "Goal mass assignment" request submitted by HR or Administrator.

columns.Name: MASS_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: The system generated surrogate key for this entry

columns.Name: EXCLUDE_WORKERS_NOT_IN_GP_FLAG
columns.Comments: Exclude workers who are not in the goal plan.

columns.Name: ACTION_TYPE
columns.Comments: Stores mass action type - share or assign action

columns.Name: REVIEW_PERIOD_ID
columns.Comments: The review period id of the goal plan.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_BUSINESS_GROUPS

columns.Name: REQUEST_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Type of request. Possible values are "Goal Plan Generation" and "Goal Mass Assignment"

columns.Name: GOAL_PLAN_ID
columns.Comments: Id of the Goal Plan that is to be assigned through goal plan generation process.

columns.Name: GOAL_PLAN_SET_ID
columns.Comments: Id of the Goal Plan Set that is to be assigned through goal plan set generation process.

columns.Name: REQ_SUBMITTED_BY_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F, which holds ID of person who submits the request.

columns.Name: REQ_ON_BEHALF_OF_PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F, which holds the requester's ID.

columns.Name: REQUEST_SUBMISSION_DATE
columns.Comments: Date of request submission

columns.Name: REQUEST_SOURCE_CODE
columns.Comments: To store the source of the request submission like Manager flow, Admin flow etc

columns.Name: REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the request ID of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: JOB_DEFINITION_NAME
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the name of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: JOB_DEFINITION_PACKAGE
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the package name of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: MASS_REQUEST_NAME
columns.Comments: The name of the mass request.

columns.Name: PARENT_ID
columns.Comments: The parent mass request Id.
